---
title: "Gabriel Frazer-McKee"
page-layout: full
listing:
  - id: recent-news
    contents: posts
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    max-items: 3
    categories: true
    fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
---

::: {.landing-page}

::: {.hero-grid}

::: {.hero-text}

# Gabriel Frazer-McKee

## PhD candidate in linguistics at Université Laval

::: {.social-row}
[{{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/gafrm)
[{{< fa brands orcid >}}](https://orcid.org)
[{{< fa solid graduation-cap >}}](https://scholar.google.com)
[{{< fa solid envelope >}}](contact.qmd)
:::

I study neology, lexical diffusion, corpus linguistics, lexicography, and methods for synthesizing linguistic evidence. My doctoral work examines the linguistic and extralinguistic factors associated with the diffusion and non-diffusion of new words.

[Learn more about me →](about.qmd){.learn-more}

:::

::: {.hero-graphic}

::: {.circle-graphic}
:::

:::

:::

::: {.news-bottom}

## Recent news

::: {#recent-news}
:::

:::

:::
